My issue here is that the Republican party has attacked scientific consensus for so long that we may be beyond the point where market incentives are a realistic means of tackling this issue. Thirty years ago a carbon tax would have radically changed how we developed, and possibly curbed the adverse effects, but now we may well need extreme state intervention to tackle the issue.

You can all hate me...i dont really give a fuck about the jews.  Or any other specific group.  I am under the impression that all good people deserve respect.  But if youre the source of nightmares for others?  Then just go away.

I truly think even legal immigration should have the brakes put on it until we can get a handle on border security and immigration security vetting. Not a complete shutdown, lets just say a 2/3 shutdown for a year or two. This gives time to get the wall under construction, and see how well the deportation process has matured. Once this is done, then revisit a new, re calculated idea of how many immigrants will be beneficial or not. Just opening the flood gates or nor doing anything is a disaster. Look at the EU and the destruction their open immigration has caused. Needs to be used as an example of why a tightly controlled immigration system is a necessity.

Now I think most sensible people here can think the alt-right are lunatics that should not be taken seriously - hence, why the need to censor them? They're about as harmful as the modern day KKK - nobody's getting lynched like they were back in the 19th and early 20th centuries, nobody's having their rights taken away - this is free speech 101 guys. Twitter is like super universal at this point and the double standard hate group bullshit they're pushing is REALLY getting old. The fact that black supremacist and white hate twitter accounts are still up and running yet alt-right ones are taken down is pretty insanely hilarious.
